message:
fix(core): handle semver pre-release and build metadata in ApiVersion::parse

ApiVersion::parse previously failed on version strings with pre-release
suffixes (e.g., 1.2.3-alpha.1) or build metadata (e.g., 1.2.3+build.42)
because it split on '.' and found more than 3 parts. The fix strips the
pre-release suffix (after '-') and build metadata (after '+') before
parsing the three numeric components.

Three new test cases cover pre-release, build metadata, and combined
pre-release+build forms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
